intro.heading: What is Devcon?
intro.lead: Where the people behind decentralized systems come together to learn, build, and connect.
intro.body: Devcon is an annual global event organized by the Ethereum Foundation; a space to dive into open-source technology, meet the communities behind it, and explore the ideas defining the future of open technology

why_india.heading: Why Devcon India?
why_india.subheading_1: India is where Ethereum is being built for the world
why_india.body_1_para_1: India has one of the world's most extraordinary concentrations of engineering talent, and one of its fastest-growing open-source communities.
why_india.body_1_para_2: The work happening here is not peripheral to Ethereum's development. Infrastructure, ZK identity systems, and coordination layers built in India power Ethereum globally.
why_india.subheading_2: Where sovereignty is built at scale
why_india.body_2_prefix: India is the home of engineers who didn't wait for permission, in a country that leapfrogged the entire technological generation.
why_india.body_2_strong: Building at scale creates innovation at scale
why_india.body_2_suffix_para_2: Devcon isn't coming to Mumbai to introduce Ethereum to India. Devcon 8 is in Mumbai to recognize and champion what India is already building.

stats.desc: Largest public and open source contributor base in the world
Of Indian startups use open source AI
India leads in new crypto developer onboarding
Open source public software required by Indian government

builders.heading: Devcon is for builders of all kind
builders.body_1_prefix: At its core, Devcon is grounded in a set of properties:
builders.body_1_suffix: . Everything is designed to support technology that remains open, verifiable, and resilient.
builders.body_2: Whether you're an open-source contributor who champions collective ownership, an advocate fighting for digital privacy and peer-to-peer freedom, a researcher exploring fairer economic models, or someone who builds tools because they should belong to everyone, there is a place for you at Devcon.
builders.global_lead_para_1: We don't go where everyone else goes.
builders.global_lead_para_2: We go where something is growing, where there's community waiting to be met, potential waiting to be unlocked, and impact that outlasts the event itself.
builders.global_quote: "The difference between Argentina and some of the wealthier countries is that in wealthier places, there are people who are excited about crypto ideas and theory, but people here deeply understand that crypto is solving real problems."
builders.global_right_body: Ethereum isn't merely a technical solution, but a community. While blockchain communities in Europe and North America are already strong and vivid, we can have a big impact today in newly developing communities.

get_involved.heading: Share your ideas & improve Devcon
get_involved.body_prefix: We're always striving to improve Devcon for everyone, and we love dogfooding Ethereum projects.
get_involved.body_middle: are your opportunity to share your ideas and
get_involved.body_link: make a proposal on how to improve Devcon!
